results.question: What is the ratio of customers who pay in EUR against customers who pay in CZK?
results.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(Currency = 'EUR', 1, 0)) AS FLOAT) / SUM(IIF(Currency = 'CZK', 1, 0)) AS ratio FROM customers

results.question: In 2012, who had the least consumption in LAM?
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Segment = 'LAM' AND SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: What was the average monthly consumption of customers in SME for the year 2013?
results.gold_sql: SELECT AVG(T2.Consumption) / 12 FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND T1.Segment = 'SME'

results.question: What was the difference in gas consumption between CZK-paying customers and EUR-paying customers in 2012?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(IIF(T1.Currency = 'CZK', T2.Consumption, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.Currency = 'EUR', T2.Consumption, 0)) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2012'

results.question: Which year recorded the most consumption of gas paid in CZK?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Currency = 'CZK' GROUP BY SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: What was the gas consumption peak month for SME customers in 2013?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUBSTR(T2.Date, 5, 2) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND T1.Segment = 'SME' GROUP BY SUBSTR(T2.Date, 5, 2) ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: What is the difference in the annual average consumption of the customers with the least amount of consumption paid in CZK for 2013 between SME and LAM, LAM and KAM, and KAM and SME?
results.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) - CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) , CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) - CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) , CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) - CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Currency = 'CZK' AND T2.Consumption = ( SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth ) AND T2.Date BETWEEN 201301 AND 201312

results.question: Which of the three segments—SME, LAM and KAM—has the biggest and lowest percentage increases in consumption paid in EUR between 2012 and 2013?
results.gold_sql: SELECT CAST((SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME' AND T2.Date LIKE '2013%', T2.Consumption, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME' AND T2.Date LIKE '2012%', T2.Consumption, 0))) AS FLOAT) * 100 / SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME' AND T2.Date LIKE '2012%', T2.Consumption, 0)), CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM' AND T2.Date LIKE '2013%', T2.Consumption, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM' AND T2.Date LIKE '2012%', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS FLOAT) * 100 / SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM' AND T2.Date LIKE '2012%', T2.Consumption, 0)) , CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM' AND T2.Date LIKE '2013%', T2.Consumption, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM' AND T2.Date LIKE '2012%', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS FLOAT) * 100 / SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM' AND T2.Date LIKE '2012%', T2.Consumption, 0)) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID

results.question: How much did customer 6 consume in total between August and November 2013?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311'

results.question: How many more "discount" gas stations does the Czech Republic have compared to Slovakia?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(IIF(Country = 'CZE', 1, 0)) - SUM(IIF(Country = 'SVK', 1, 0)) FROM gasstations WHERE Segment = 'Discount'

results.question: Is it true that more SMEs pay in Czech koruna than in euros? If so, how many more?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(Currency = 'CZK') - SUM(Currency = 'EUR') FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'SME'

results.question: How many percent of LAM customer consumed more than 46.73?
results.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.Consumption > 46.73, 1, 0)) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Segment = 'LAM'

results.question: In February 2012, what percentage of customers consumed more than 528.3?
results.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(Consumption > 528.3, 1, 0)) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(CustomerID) FROM yearmonth WHERE Date = '201202'

results.question: What is the highest monthly consumption in the year 2012?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2012' GROUP BY SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) ORDER BY SUM(Consumption) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Please list the product description of the products consumed in September, 2013.
results.gold_sql: SELECT T3.Description FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID INNER JOIN products AS T3 ON T1.ProductID = T3.ProductID WHERE T2.Date = '201309'

results.question: Please list the countries of the gas stations with transactions taken place in June, 2013.
results.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Country FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID WHERE T3.Date = '201306'

results.question: Among the customers who paid in euro, how many of them have a monthly consumption of over 1000?
results.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM yearmonth AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T2.Currency = 'EUR' AND T1.Consumption > 1000.00

results.question: Please list the product descriptions of the transactions taken place in the gas stations in the Czech Republic.
results.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Description FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID INNER JOIN products AS T3 ON T1.ProductID = T3.ProductID WHERE T2.Country = 'CZE'

results.question: Please list the disparate time of the transactions taken place in the gas stations from chain no. 11.
results.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Time FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID WHERE T2.ChainID = 11

results.question: Among the transactions made in the gas stations in the Czech Republic, how many of them are taken place after 2012/1/1?
results.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.TransactionID) FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID WHERE T2.Country = 'CZE' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Date) >= '2012'

results.question: What kind of currency did the customer paid at 16:25:00 in 2012/8/24?
results.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Currency FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID INNER JOIN customers AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-24' AND T1.Time = '16:25:00'

results.question: What segment did the customer have at 2012/8/23 21:20:00?
results.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Segment FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.date = '2012-08-23' AND T1.time = '21:20:00'

results.question: For all the transactions happened during 8:00-9:00 in 2012/8/26, how many happened in CZE?
results.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.TransactionID) FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-26' AND T1.Time BETWEEN '08:00:00' AND '09:00:00' AND T2.Country = 'CZE'

results.question: What's the nationality of the customer who spent 548.4 in 2012/8/24?
results.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Country FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-24' AND T1.Price  = 548.4

results.question: What is the percentage of the customers who used EUR in 2012/8/25?
results.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.Currency = 'EUR', 1, 0)) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-25'

results.question: For the customer who paid 634.8 in 2012/8/25, what was the consumption decrease rate from Year 2012 to 2013?
results.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(SUBSTRING(Date, 1, 4) = '2012', Consumption, 0)) - SUM(IIF(SUBSTRING(Date, 1, 4) = '2013', Consumption, 0)) AS FLOAT) / SUM(IIF(SUBSTRING(Date, 1, 4) = '2012', Consumption, 0)) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = ( SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-25' AND T1.Price  = 1513.12 )

results.question: What is the percentage of "premium" against the overall segment in Country = "SVK"?
results.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(Country = 'SVK' AND Segment = 'Premium', 1, 0)) AS FLOAT) * 100 / SUM(IIF(Country = 'SVK', 1, 0)) FROM gasstations

results.question: What is the amount spent by customer "38508" at the gas stations? How much had the customer spent in January 2012?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(T1.Price ) , SUM(IIF(T3.Date = '201201', T1.Price, 0)) FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID WHERE T1.CustomerID = '38508'

results.question: Who is the top spending customer and how much is the average price per single item purchased by this customer? What currency was being used?
results.gold_sql: SELECT T2.CustomerID, SUM(T2.Price / T2.Amount), T1.Currency FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T2.CustomerID = ( SELECT CustomerID FROM yearmonth ORDER BY Consumption DESC LIMIT 1 ) GROUP BY T2.CustomerID, T1.Currency

results.question: For all the people who paid more than 29.00 per unit of product id No.5. Give their consumption status in the August of 2012.
results.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Consumption FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Price / T1.Amount > 29.00 AND T1.ProductID = 5 AND T2.Date = '201208'

results.question: What's Angela Sanders's major?
results.gold_sql: SELECT T2.major_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Angela' AND T1.last_name = 'Sanders'
results.generated_sql: SELECT major.major_name FROM member JOIN major ON member.link_to_major = major.major_id WHERE member.first_name = 'Angela' AND member.last_name = 'Sanders';

results.question: Among the students from the Student_Club who attended the event "Women's Soccer", how many of them want a T-shirt that's in medium size?
results.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.event_id) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T2.link_to_member = T3.member_id WHERE T1.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer' AND T3.t_shirt_size = 'Medium'
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance JOIN event ON attendance.link_to_event = event.event_id JOIN member ON attendance.link_to_member = member.member_id WHERE event.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer' AND member.t_shirt_size = 'Medium';

results.question: Among the events attended by more than 10 members of the Student_Club, how many of them are meetings?
results.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.event_id) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.type = 'Meeting' GROUP BY T1.event_id HAVING COUNT(T2.link_to_event) > 10
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event WHERE event_id IN ( SELECT link_to_event FROM attendance GROUP BY link_to_event HAVING COUNT(link_to_member) > 10 ) AND type = 'Meeting';

results.question: List all the names of events that had an attendance of over 20 students but were not fundraisers.
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event GROUP BY T1.event_id HAVING COUNT(T2.link_to_event) > 20 EXCEPT SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1  WHERE T1.type = 'Fundraiser'
results.generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT event.event_name FROM event JOIN attendance ON event.event_id = attendance.link_to_event WHERE event.event_id IN ( SELECT link_to_event FROM attendance GROUP BY link_to_event HAVING COUNT(link_to_member) > 20 ) AND event.type != 'Fundraiser';

results.question: What is the amount of the funds that the Vice President received?
results.gold_sql: SELECT T2.amount FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN income AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.position = 'Vice President'
results.generated_sql: SELECT income.amount FROM income JOIN member ON income.link_to_member = member.member_id WHERE member.position = 'Vice President';

results.question: List the full name of the Student_Club members that grew up in Illinois state.
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T1.zip = T2.zip_code WHERE T2.state = 'Illinois'
results.generated_sql: SELECT member.first_name, member.last_name FROM member JOIN zip_code ON member.zip = zip_code.zip_code WHERE zip_code.state = 'Illinois';

results.question: Was each expense in October Meeting on October 8, 2019 approved?
results.gold_sql: SELECT T3.approved FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget WHERE T1.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND T1.event_date LIKE '2019-10-08%'
results.generated_sql: SELECT expense.expense_id, expense.expense_description, expense.approved FROM expense JOIN budget ON expense.link_to_budget = budget.budget_id JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND event.event_date = '2019-10-08T12:00:00';

results.question: Calculate the total average cost that Elijah Allen spent in the events on September and October.
results.gold_sql: SELECT AVG(T2.cost) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.last_name = 'Allen' AND T1.first_name = 'Elijah' AND (SUBSTR(T2.expense_date, 6, 2) = '09' OR SUBSTR(T2.expense_date, 6, 2) = '10')
results.generated_sql: SELECT AVG(expense.cost) FROM expense JOIN member ON expense.link_to_member = member.member_id WHERE member.first_name = 'Elijah' AND member.last_name = 'Allen' AND (SUBSTR(expense.expense_date, 6, 2) = '09' OR SUBSTR(expense.expense_date, 6, 2) = '10');

results.question: Calculate the difference of the total amount spent in all events by the Student_Club in year 2019 and 2020.
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) AS num FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
results.generated_sql: SELECT (SELECT SUM(budget.spent) FROM budget JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id WHERE substr(event.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019') - (SELECT SUM(budget.spent) FROM budget JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id WHERE substr(event.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020') AS difference;

results.question: What was the notes of the fundraising on 2019/9/14?

results.generated_sql: SELECT notes FROM income WHERE source = 'Fundraising' AND date_received = '2019-09-14';
